de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.analyst

Class ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.analyst.ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IProofReferencesAnalyst

    public class ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst
extends Object
implements IProofReferencesAnalyst
    Extracts read and write access to fields (IProgramVariable) via assignments.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeReferences(Node node, Services services)
      Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.
      protected void listReferences(Node node, ProgramElement pe, ProgramVariable arrayLength, LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> toFill, boolean includeExpressionContainer)
      Extracts the proof references recursive.

      • ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst

        public ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst()

    • Method Detail

      • computeReferences

        public LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeReferences(Node node,
                                                  Services services)
        Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.
        Specified by:
        computeReferences in interface IProofReferencesAnalyst
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to compute its IProofReferences.
        services - The Services to use.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReference or null/empty set if the applied rule is not supported.

      • listReferences

        protected void listReferences(Node node,
                  ProgramElement pe,
                  ProgramVariable arrayLength,
                  LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> toFill,
                  boolean includeExpressionContainer)
        Extracts the proof references recursive.
        Parameters:
        node - The node.
        pe - The current ProgramElement.
        arrayLength - The ProgramVariable used for array length which is ignored.
        toFill - The LinkedHashSet to fill.
        includeExpressionContainer - Include ExpressionContainer?
